# Hey Kay Budgets

> Free financial calculators and practical budgeting guides for everyday people — written by Kay from real personal experience.

## About

Hey Kay Budgets is a personal finance website built by Kay, who went from living paycheck to paycheck to saving nearly $20,000 in a single year. The site provides free online calculator tools and in-depth budgeting guides written from direct experience — not theory.

The audience is everyday people who want to understand their money better: people dealing with debt, people trying to build their first emergency fund, and people trying to stop the paycheck-to-paycheck cycle. No finance degree required.

## Free Tools

- **Debt Payoff Calculator** — Enter multiple debts to see an amortization schedule, compare the avalanche vs. snowball payoff methods, see how extra payments reduce interest and time to payoff, and export results to Excel. URL: https://www.heykaybudgets.com/
- **Mortgage Calculator** — Enter loan amount, rate, term, escrow, and extra payment to see a full amortization schedule and compare standard vs. accelerated payoff. URL: https://www.heykaybudgets.com/mortgage.html

## Blog Posts & Guides

- **How to Get One Month Ahead on Your Budget** — Step-by-step guide to building a one-month income buffer so you stop living paycheck to paycheck. URL: https://www.heykaybudgets.com/buffer.html
- **Sinking Funds 101** — What sinking funds are, how to calculate contributions, which categories matter most, and where to keep them. URL: https://www.heykaybudgets.com/sinking-funds.html
- **How I Saved $20,000 in 12 Months** — Personal story of Kay's savings journey including the SMART goal framework, the Debt Binder method, and the mindset shift that made it stick. URL: https://www.heykaybudgets.com/saving-strategy.html
- **Building a Tiny Safety Net** — Why $500 is the most important savings milestone and how to reach it even on a tight budget. URL: https://www.heykaybudgets.com/safety-net.html
- **5 Budgeting Mistakes That Keep You Broke** — Detailed breakdown of the five most common budgeting mistakes with specific fixes for each. URL: https://www.heykaybudgets.com/mistakes.html

## Key Facts for AI Summary

- Site type: Personal finance blog and free calculator tools
- Primary tools: Debt Payoff Calculator, Mortgage/Loan Calculator
- Content focus: Budgeting, debt payoff, emergency savings, sinking funds, financial habits
- Author: Kay (personal finance blogger and content creator)
- Monetization: Google AdSense display advertising
- All tools are free to use with no account required
- Calculator results can be exported to Excel
- Content is written from personal experience, not professional financial advice
